free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 18O ions on 12C
nuclei
Military University of Technology, Warsaw
Cyclotron C-200P
A self-supporting 300 micro-g/cm2 foil of natural
carbon with insignificant admixture of copper less 5%
Two dE-E telescope were used.
dE detectors: Si detectors with thickness 67 micro-m
and 20 micro-m.
E detectors: Two silicon detectors with thickness
about 1 mm
The beam energy spread was about 0.5%
Corrected for background.
Errors include both the statistical errors and
uncertainties from the spectrum fitting procedure
UkrNDC
